items.name: Triangle Black Zig Zag Bikini
items.description:
Chic and timeless, the Noir Tide Bikini is your go-to for minimalist beach glamour. With a subtle zigzag texture and clean black silhouette, it’s sleek, confident, and effortlessly cool. Match it with the Noir Veil Cardigan for a layered, fashion-forward beach vibe.

🔗 https://www.roblox.com/communities/33000260/GMARI#!/store
